rationale: In the citing paper, Toubia et al. (2019) appears only once in a grouped list of examples of LDA applications in marketing. The paper does not discuss that study's specific method, findings, or constructs, and it does not use it to develop hypotheses, model components, measures, or interpretation. The substantive methodological foundation for the new model is instead tied to other work (especially Jacobs et al. and related topic-model papers), so this citation functions as background context only.
